blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Add endpoint to verify sync functionality
Check if booking data is synced back to the main booking system.

rawData.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of syncing back to the main booking system, but the evidence does not confirm this functionality. While there are multiple passed steps indicating successful bookings and calendar reviews, there is no direct evidence showing that the booking data is being synced back to the main system as required. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence provided regarding the specific requirement of syncing back to the main booking system.
gaps: No evidence of syncing back to the main booking system.
